title: OpenClaw status --deep should not misdiagnose healthy memory providers as invalid

source.license_note: Synthetic ops scenario derived from openclaw/openclaw issue #62855.

task.summary: Diagnose why status --deep reports a healthy memory provider as invalid.
task.instructions: Use the incident evidence to confirm that the provider is actually healthy, localize the false diagnostic to the memory status/config resolution path, and propose an ops-level repair plan that restores accurate diagnostics.
task.acceptance_notes: This GitHub-derived ops scenario is synthetic and graded behaviorally.

visible_context.issue_text: status --deep can say `invalid config` for a memory plugin that is still loaded, registered, and ready.
error_logs: [plugins] memory-lancedb-pro invalid config: embedding: must have required property 'embedding'
Memory │ plugin memory-lancedb-pro · vector ready · fts ready
reproduction_steps: Explain where config context or status rendering is being lost.
visible_context.notes: This fixture models status-diagnostic triage, not the full plugin runtime.

ops_fault.description: Synthetic status/diagnostic incident derived from the GitHub issue.
